content: Zod v4 is stable as of mid-2025. Install: npm install zod@^4.0.0. The import path during transition is 'import { z } from zod/v4' but v4 is now at the package root. z.infer<typeof schema> still works. Parse methods: schema.parse(data) throws ZodError on failure; schema.safeParse(data) returns {success, data} | {success, error}. Key v4 changes: input type of z.coerce is now unknown (was string in v3). z.ZodType generic updated. Error issue count reduced from 15 to 11 types. zod/v3 subpath provides backward compat. For Mandelbrut: use parse() at synthesis boundaries, safeParse() in UI. Zod Mini (import from 'zod/mini') for smaller bundles where needed.
